name: White Mountain Strawberry Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and confectioner's sugar until light in color.
2. Add the dissolved powdered gelatin to the egg mixture.
3. Stir in the milk, vanilla extract, and heavy cream (to which salt has been added).
4. Whisk everything together until stiff peaks form in an ice-cold bowl.
5. Strain the crushed sweetened strawberries through a sieve.
6. Sweeten and stir the strained strawberries into the mixture.
7. Freeze until firm. Makes 4 quarts.
